title: Move or copy automations to a different board
excerpt:

posts.author: Servion123 (Servion)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone know if there is a way to “move” current automations to a different board without having to recreate them?

I am working on merging two boards and would rather not re-create all these automations. Looking to see if there’s an easier way to do this.

Thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Not that I know of. Here’s the link to request that feature Feature requests - monday Community Forum
